name: Bacon Walnut and Feta Focaccia
recipeIngredient: 1 green onion, green part only, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon in a skillet until it is crisp. Drain on paper towels.
2. Crumble the cooked bacon and arrange it on the focaccia.
3. Sprinkle with the minced green onion, chopped walnuts, and crumbled feta cheese.
4. Place the dish on a baking sheet.
5. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit until the cheese melts and all ingredients are hot, for 6 to 10 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
